opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Cascade Heating & Cooling is phone-only with no booking tool detected on site or GMB.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC customers calling after hours are booking competitors who offer instant scheduling.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget capturing appointment requests 24/7 without requiring a live call.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no loyalty or recurring service signals found on the site.
opportunities.observation: Past Boise customers are not being prompted for seasonal tune-ups, leaving recurring revenue uncaptured.
opportunities.fix: Automate pre-summer and pre-winter maintenance reminders via SMS and email to the existing customer list.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM Automation
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; all contact is phone-only with no digital follow-up infrastructure.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call in Boise leaves zero record, making follow-up and recovery impossible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording with automatic CRM capture to log every caller and trigger follow-up sequences.
